surface_verification.justification: Python detective-audit check/config change (group_d D5 + audit_detector disabled_checks + repo audit_config.json) with no user-facing web/UI surface; covered by 581 compliance-plugin + full 2712-pass shared suite, the artifact-path-canon lint, and an end-to-end real-repo audit probe (6 fails -> 2). No dev server / E2E surface applies.

behaviors.behavior: D5 exempts change_type in {tooling,compliance,infra,docs} WITH none_reason, incl. casing (AC-1)
D5 requires none_reason for the change_type exemption (true gate parity; review MEDIUM)
D5 still exempts spec_impact=none; flags no-FR-no-exemption; rejects unknown change_type
disabled_checks rewrites a FAILing finding to skip + any_fail false (AC-2/AC-4)
disabled check that PASSES keeps pass (review LOW — only FAIL suppressed)
default (no key) = no-op (AC-3); default config empty list
edits keep artifact-path-canon lint green (self-caught regression)

behaviors.evidence: Step 7.5 run_audit.py --fix probe: A5.6/B7/D1/G2 SKIP, D5 4->1, G3 unchanged

behaviors.reason: documentation prose; the behavior it describes is covered by the tests above

degraded.detail: Full shared suite: 2712 passed, 14 skipped, 1 failure (test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact) — PRE-EXISTING and unrelated, stash-verified this iterate (clean origin/main base fails identically). This iterate touches only plugins/shipwright-compliance/scripts/audit/{group_d,audit_detector}.py + audit_config.json + tests + docs.

My initial group_d.py + audit_config.json edits tripped the artifact-path-canon lint (bare 'compliance' literal + slashed plugin-path strings reading as legacy artifact paths). Stash-verified the failure was MINE (clean base passed), fixed via the established # artifact-path-canon: legacy marker + comma/path rewording. Now green.

Code-reviewer subagent reviewed the diff: 1 MEDIUM (D5 parity gap — exemption now requires none_reason, matching the record_event gate) + 3 LOW (casing comment, pass-preservation guard, disable-scope note) all addressed.
